name: Forge Reality
title: FORGE - Industrial Coworking Space
description: Industrial-themed coworking space template with a bold dark aesthetic and no framework dependencies. Features a dramatic hero section with rotating background images and large display typography. The features section presents six stat cards with animated counters and progress bars. A spaces section showcases six workspace types in a grid with hover effects. Pricing section includes a monthly/yearly toggle with three tiered plan cards plus an enterprise CTA. Amenities section lists eight facility features. Contact section combines address info, an embedded Google Map, and a multi-field contact form. Closes with a bold CTA section and a comprehensive dark footer with newsletter signup.

typography.style: Industrial display headings in Bebas Neue with heavy weight. Clean Inter body text. Strong typographic hierarchy.

layoutDetails: Full-width hero with rotating backgrounds. Six-column feature cards grid. Six-card workspace showcase. Three-column pricing cards with toggle. Two-column contact layout with map and form.
visualStyle: Dark industrial aesthetic. Red and orange accent colors against near-black backgrounds. Bold typography with Bebas Neue display font. Card-based layouts with subtle hover animations.
